item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import re
from pathlib import Path

paths = [
    Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json'),
    Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md'),
]
patterns = {
    'generated_at': re.compile(r'generated_at', re.I),
    'timestamp_word': re.compile(r'\\btimestamps?\\b', re.I),
    'iso_date': re.compile(r'(?<"'!'"\\d)\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}(?"'!'"\\d)'),
    'iso_datetime': re.compile(r'(?<"'!'"\\d)\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}[Tt][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(?::[0-9]{2}(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)?(?:[Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2})?'),
}
hits = []
for path in paths:
    text = path.read_text()
    for name, pattern in patterns.items():
        for match in pattern.finditer(text):
            hits.append((str(path), name, match.group(0)))
print(f'files_checked={len(paths)}')
print(f'forbidden_hits={len(hits)}')
for hit in hits:
    print(hit)
assert hits == []
print('RESULT=PASS')
PY"
